title: Font Descriptor Specification (0x1F)
description: Specifies the attributes of the desired font in a coded font reference.

elements.name: FtHeight
elements.description: Specifies vertical font size in 1440ths of an inch (20ths of a point)

elements.name: FtWidth
elements.description: Specifies horizontal font size in 1440ths of an inch (20ths of a point)

elements.name: FtDsFlags
elements.description: Qualifies the type of font characters (Italics, hollow, underscored, etc.)
